full_text:
Wang Hai 王海
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Hai (王海)was born in Yuzhang. Leader of bandits in the east of Poyang, killed by He Qi. Wang Hai lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
